product: End of support for legacy dashboards
tagline: You can no longer create or clone legacy dashboards using the UI or API.
what_it_does: You can no longer create or clone legacy dashboards using the UI or API. Databricks continues to address critical security issues and service outages, but recommends using AI/BI dashboards for all new development. To learn more about AI/BI dashboards, see Dashboards.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: You can no longer create or clone legacy dashboards using the UI or API. Databricks continues to address critical security issues and service outages, but recommends using AI/BI dashboards for all new development.
key_takeaway: You can no longer create or clone legacy dashboards using the UI or API.
